Free of charge

ProMax

199,000 VND /time
  • 300,000 tokens
  • All Pro features
  • The most advanced AI model
  • 24/7 priority support

For many needs

Optimal for document, academic, technical and administrative translation

Administrative – documents

Keep layout, titles, bullets; in accordance with minutes, official dispatches and contracts.

Technical – report

Stabilize terminology, limit unit and data errors; table support.

Study – research

Translate long passages, keeping citations; Conveniently copy, download, and save history.

Marketing – content

Prioritize naturalness and coherence; suitable web content, email, gender introduction.

Frequently asked questions

A few quick answers before you get started

Does translation preserve formatting?

Have. With text, on Rich editor and Keep formatting. With documents, the system will try keep heading/table/bullet depending on input format.

Where can I download the translated file?

After uploading the document, the system will process and automatically create a download link down. You can also review in History.

Is my data safe?

The system only saves what is necessary for you to view history and download results fruit; You can clear your history at any time in Dashboard.

Why are translations sometimes cut short?

Some limits are packet and input length dependent. If you translate Long documents, use upload documents or upgrade package to increase limit.

/about.html:
About AI Translation System

We are a team passionate about AI technology, committed to providing solutions The smartest translation for everyone.

Our story

AI Translation System was founded with a simple but mission Ambitious: making translation easy and accurate and reach people globally.

We find that language is the biggest barrier human connection. With the development of artificial intelligence, they I believe this barrier can be broken by providing tools High quality, fast and reliable translation.

From a small project in the lab we grew into a leading AI translation platform, serving thousands users every day around the world.

Our team

Mission

Providing the most advanced AI translation solutions, helping everyone overcome language barriers, connect cultures and promote exchanges international.

Vision

Become the world's leading AI translation platform, in every language Languages can communicate freely and any content is possible Translate correctly.

Core values

  • Accurate and reliable
  • Innovation and creativity
  • Security and privacy
  • Serving the community

Our team

The people who make AI Translation System

AI expert with more than 10 years of experience in the field of language processing natural language.

/privacy.html:
Privacy policy

Effective: June 19, 2026 · Last updated: June 19, 2026
Privacy Clause AI Terms Pay Delete data Support

1. Introducing the home page

This policy describes how AI Translation System (“Application”, “We”) collects collect, use, store and protect personal data when you use the application mobile applications, websites and related services.

Developer/operator: [Company name or registered individual]

Address: [Contact address]

E-mail: support@aitranslator.vn

Website: [https://yourdomain.com]

2. Data we collect 

2.1. Account information.

  • Full name, email address
  • Phone number (if you provide it via contact form or support request support)
  • Avatar (if logged in with Google)
  • Google identifier (Google ID) when using Google Sign-In
  • Encrypted password (if registering with email/password)
  • Service plan (free/pro/promax) and token balance

2.2. Service usage data

  • Text, documents (PDF, Word, ...) and images you upload for translation
  • Translation results, source/target languages, translation history
  • Application settings: default language, interface, preferred AI model like

2.3. Technical data

  • IP address, browser/device (User-Agent) when logging in
  • Login session token (JWT) stored on the device
  • Technical error log (if any) for troubleshooting

2.4. Pay

  • Transaction code, amount, payment status via SePay portal
  • We Are not Store bank card numbers online continue

2.5. Contact & support

  • Content of message sent via contact form (full name, email, content)
  • Email to sign up for newsletter (if you agree)

3. Purpose of using data

  • Providing and operating AI translation services
  • Personalize the experience (default language, interface, translation packs service)
  • Account authentication, security, and anti-abuse
  • Save translation history and manage tokens/packages
  • Payment processing and package upgrades (see Payment policy)
  • Send service notifications, authenticate OTP, respond to support requests
  • Improve service quality and user experience (statistics anonymous, no data sold)
  • Comply with legal obligations (if any)

4. Legal basis

We process data based on: (i) performance of contract/service with you; (ii) your consent (e.g. newsletter subscription); (iii) benefits legal (security, anti-fraud); (iv) legal obligations.

5. Share data with third parties

We may share data with the following parties only when necessary To operate the service:

  • Google — OAuth 2.0 login (Google Sign-In)
  • Google Translate / DeepL / Gemini (OpenRouter) — Process the content that needs to be translated
  • SePay — payment processing
  • Infrastructure provider — server, database (hosting)

We Not for sale, rental or exchange data your profile to third parties for advertising purposes. Your content sent so the translation can be transmitted to the translation AI provider; fun Please do not send sensitive information unless necessary.

Exceptions (not considered "bad selling". material”):

  • Legal requests of state agencies or competent courts;
  • Payment partner (SePay, bank) — only transaction data needed necessary for control;
  • Organ supplier (hosting, email) — handled according to insurance contract confidential, not used for private purposes;
  • Protect the legal rights of the Platform or other users where applicable fraud dispute.

5.1. AI data and model training

We DON'T Use text, documents or prompt to retrain your own AI model. Details at Terms of use of AI features.

6. Cookies and local storage

  • The login token (JWT) is saved on the browser/device for persistence session
  • Interface settings and user preferences (localStorage/sessionStorage)

Currently we Are not use Google Analytics, Firebase Analytics or behavioral advertising tool. If replaced changes, we will update this policy.

7. Storage time

  • Account: until you request deletion
  • Translation history: according to account settings or until account deletion
  • Temporarily uploaded files: deleted after processing is complete (according to system configuration)
  • Login log: maximum 12 months (adjustable)
  • Payment data: according to current accounting/tax regulations

8. User rights

According to personal data protection regulations, you have the right to:

  • Access — view account information in Settings set/Profile;
  • Edit — update full name, avatar, depending select application;
  • Erase — delete translation history or request account deletion (Data deletion policy);
  • Withdraw consent — for example, unsubscribe from any newsletter any time;
  • Complaints — with the competent data protection authority rights if it is believed that the rights have been violated.

See details on how to delete your account at Data deletion policy.

9. Security

We apply appropriate technical and organizational measures: encryption password, JWT, HTTPS, access authorization, database backup. No system is 100% secure; If something goes wrong, we will notice according to legal regulations.

10. Children

The Services are not directed to persons under 13 years of age (or 16 years of age in some countries). area). We do not knowingly collect children's data. If broadcast currently, we will delete it immediately.

11. International data transfer

The server or AI provider may be located outside your country of residence. By using the service, you agree to the necessary data transmission Translation purposes..

12. Policy changes

We may update this policy. New version will be posted at this URL with updated date. Continued use of the service after Updating means you accept the changes.

13. Contact

For questions about privacy, please email support@aitranslator.vn or over contact page.
© 2026 AI Translation System. Privacy · Terms · AI Terms · Payment · Data Deletion · Support

/terms.html: Privacy Clause AI Terms Pay Delete data Support

1. Accept terms

By downloading, installing or using AI Translation System, you agree comply with these Terms, Privacy policy, Terms of use of AI features and Payment policy. If you do not agree, please stop using the service.

2. Service description

The application provides text, document and image translation (OCR) services using artificial intelligence, includes free and paid plans. Translation results are for reference only; We do not guarantee absolute accuracy for all professional contexts.

3. User account

  • You must provide accurate information when registering
  • You are responsible for maintaining the security of your password and login device
  • One email can only be associated with one account
  • Google Sign In is subject to Google's terms
  • Notify us immediately if you detect unauthorized access

4. User rights and responsibilities

You commit to:

  • Only upload content you have the rights to use or have permission to translate
  • Do not use the service for illegal, fraudulent or spam purposes
  • Do not attempt to sabotage, reverse-engineer, or attack the system
  • Do not share accounts or sell/transfer tokens against regulations
  • Comply with technical limits (file size, number of tokens, frequency of API calls)

5. Prohibited content

Content may not be sent or translated:

  • Violating Vietnamese or international laws
  • Inciting violence, hatred, discrimination
  • Pornographic content related to children and terrorism
  • Malware, malicious code, or harmful content
  • Personal information of third parties without permission

We reserve the right to refuse to process or block violating accounts.

6. Payment and service packages

For details on payment methods, refunds and transaction complaints, see here Payment policy. Summary:

  • Pro/ProMax package prices are displayed on the app at the time of payment
  • Payment via SePay (bank transfer); Tokens are added after a successful transaction
  • Paid packages are a one-time purchase and do not renew periodically unless otherwise notified
  • Refund within 7 days if tokens from the purchased package have not been used (see details in Payment Policy)
  • We may change package prices or features; Changes will be announced in advance

7. Intellectual property

  • Application, interface, logo, source code are owned by the developer
  • You retain rights to the content you upload
  • You grant us the right to process the content only to provide translation services
  • Translation results are yours to use — see more AI Terms

8. Limitation of liability

To the extent permitted by law:

  • The service is provided “as-is” with no guarantee of interruption
  • We are not responsible for indirect damages, loss of profits, or loss of data due to misuse
  • Not responsible for the accuracy of important contractual, medical, or legal translations — should be proofread by an expert
  • Maximum liability (if any) does not exceed the amount you have paid in the most recent 12 months

9. Account termination

  • You can request to delete your account accordingly Data deletion policy
  • We may suspend/delete accounts if they violate the Terms
  • Upon termination, service access rights and unused tokens may be forfeited

10. Third Party Services

The application integrates Google Sign-In, translation API and payment gateway. Use of those services is subject to each party's separate terms.

11. Applicable law and disputes

These terms are governed by Vietnamese law. Priority dispute resolved by negotiation; If unsuccessful, it falls under the jurisdiction of the Vietnamese court.

12. Contact

E-mail: support@aitranslator.vn · Contact form
© 2026 AI Translation System. Privacy · Terms · AI Terms · Payment · Data Deletion · Support
Terms of Use - AI Translation System

/ai-terms.html:
Terms of use of AI features

AI Terms of Service · Effective: June 19, 2026
Privacy Clause AI Terms Pay Delete data Support

1. Introduction and scope of application

Terms of use of AI features (“AI Terms”) this complements Terms of use and Privacy policy belong to AI Translation System (trademark AI Translatorr — hereinafter referred to as “Foundation", "we”).

The AI Terms apply when you use artificial intelligence (AI)-based features, including but not limited to limited: text translation, document translation (PDF, Word), recognition and translation of content from images (OCR), and other related AI features on your website, mobile app or API.

By using the AI ​​feature, you acknowledge that you have read, understood and agree to be bound by these AI Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the AI ​​features of the Platform.

2. The nature of artificial intelligence

Results generated by the Platform's AI features (“AI output”) is automatically generated by machine learning models and third-party AI services (e.g. Google Translate, DeepL, Gemini via OpenRouter). AI output:

  • Not opinions, official statements or commitments of the Platform;
  • May contain errors, omissions, translation out of context or outdated information;
  • Do not replace expert opinions in important legal, medical, financial, or technical fields;
  • Depends on the quality of input data (text, documents, images) you provide.

Important note: You should review and edit it yourself or have it checked by a suitable expert AI output before using for important purposes (contracts, legal documents, medical documents, public announcements...).

3. User Responsibilities

You are solely responsible for:

  • Content you input, upload or submit to AI systems (“Input”);
  • Use, modification, sharing, publication, distribution or commercialization AI output;
  • Comply with Vietnamese and international laws when using AI translation results;
  • Make sure you have legal rights to the Input (copyright, trade secrets, third party privacy rights).

You commit not to use AI features to:

  • Create, translate or distribute content that violates Vietnamese or international laws;
  • Creating content that incites hatred, violence, discrimination, or harassment;
  • Create content that is fraudulent, fake, or infringing on the privacy or honor of others;
  • Violate intellectual property rights, copyrights, trademarks of third parties;
  • Exceeding technical limits, abusing APIs, attacking or sabotaging the system;
  • Use for purposes prohibited by the third-party AI provider's policies.

The platform has the right to refuse processing, suspend or terminate access if violations are detected, without prior notice in case of emergency or serious violation.

4. Intellectual property rights

4.1. Input

You retain ownership of the content you upload or import. You grant the Platform permission Input processing only to the extent necessary to provide AI translation services (temporary storage, transmission to AI provider, generation of Output).

4.2. AI output

To the extent permitted by law, The right to use AI Output belongs to you, with conditions:

  • You comply with the AI ​​Terms and applicable laws;
  • You respect the intellectual property rights of original and third party content;
  • AI output may duplicate or resemble results generated by other users or other systems — The Platform does not guarantee exclusivity.

4.3. Platform and technology

Interface, source code, integrated algorithm, logo, brand AI Translatorr and AI Translation System owned by the Platform developer/operator. You may not copy, reverse-engineer or commercially exploit those components beyond the scope of using the services granted.

5. Use data and train AI models

Platform Commitment: NO

AI Translation System Do not use text, documents, images, prompts or translation history your order Train, fine-tune or improve your own AI model of Platform.

Data you submit may be transmitted to third-party AI vendors (Google, DeepL, Gemini/OpenRouter) only to fulfill translation requests at the time of your use. The processing of data by these parties is subject to their own policies. Details at Privacy policy.

The platform may save translation history in your account (if you enable saving) for your experience user. You can delete your history or request account deletion accordingly Data deletion policy.

6. Limitation and disclaimer of liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law:

  • AI features provided “status quo” (as-is) and “according to available capacity” (as-available);
  • Foundation not guaranteed AI output that is accurate, complete, timely, uninterrupted or suitable for all purposes;
  • Foundation not responsible for direct, indirect, incidental, special or consequential damages arising from your reliance, use or distribution of AI Output;
  • The Platform is not responsible for the conduct, problems or policies of third-party AI providers;
  • The Platform's maximum total liability (if any) related to AI features does not exceed the amount you have paid to the Platform in the most recent 12 months before the event causing the damage.

7. Features tested and changed

Some AI features may be in beta. We may change, suspend or discontinue AI model, token limit, language support without prior notice in case of emergency. Important changes will be announced on the website or in the application.

8. Applicable law

AI terms are governed by Vietnamese law. Disputes are preferentially resolved by negotiation; If unsuccessful, it falls under the jurisdiction of a competent court in Vietnam.

9. Contact

For questions about the AI ​​Terms, please contact: support@aitranslator.vn or over contact page.

See more: Terms of use · Privacy policy · Payment policy

/payment-policy.html: Privacy Clause AI Terms Pay Delete data Support

1. Introduction

This payment policy governs the terms related to token and service plan purchases above AI Translation System (trademark AI Translatorr). This policy is in addition to Terms of use and Privacy policy.

2. Service packages and payment methods

2.1. Service package

The platform offers the following plans (prices and token limits are displayed at the time of payment on the app):

  • Free — free, basic token limit;
  • Pro — paid plans, additional tokens and privileges;
  • ProMax — premium paid plan, larger token limit.

Paid plan is one-time purchase to upgrade the package and receive the corresponding token. Foundation Are not Subscriptions apply unless otherwise specifically notified.

2.2. Accepted payment methods

Currently, the Platform accepts payments via:

  • SePay — bank transfer (QR Code / transfer code) according to the instructions on the payment screen;
  • Other methods (VNPay, MoMo, international cards, PayPal...) if added will be announced on the application.

The amount, transfer content and invoice validity period are clearly displayed before you confirm payment.

3. Payment process

  1. You choose the Pro or ProMax package on the Dashboard/application;
  2. The system creates an invoice with transaction code and amount to be paid;
  3. You transfer the correct amount and transfer content according to the instructions;
  4. Transaction control system via SePay (automatic or manual depending on configuration);
  5. After successful confirmation, the service package and tokens are added to your account.

Normal processing time ranges from a few minutes to 24 working hours, depending on the bank's processing time. If the deadline has passed, please contact support with your invoice code.

4. Confidentiality of transaction information

  • Foundation Do not store directly your credit card number, CVV code or bank password;
  • Payment is processed via Intermediate payment gateway (SePay) complies with partner security standards;
  • We only save: invoice code, amount, transaction status, time and reconciliation information necessary for accounting;
  • All payment data transmissions on the website use an HTTPS encrypted connection.

5. Refund Policy

We consider refunds in the following cases:

  • Within 7 days Since the transaction is successful, if you Tokens have not been used yet from the package just purchased (token balance has not decreased compared to the time of upgrade);
  • Transaction suffers duplicate due to system error or payment gateway error;
  • Paid correctly but the system No packages/tokens added After 48 hours of work and it cannot be fixed.

Refunds are not supported When:

  • Tokens from the purchased package have been used (even partially);
  • Request a refund after 7 days from the date of successful transaction (except in case of system error);
  • Violate Terms of use leads to account lockout;
  • Change your mind after using the paid package token translation service.

Refund request sent to support@aitranslator.vn Include account email, invoice code, receipt photo (if any). Processing time: 5–15 business days; Refund to the bank account you transferred (if possible).

6. Cancel service and change price

  • You can stop using the paid service at any time; Purchased packages do not renew automatically;
  • Unused tokens remain in the account until expiration (if specified) or account deletion;
  • We reserve the right to adjust package prices, token limits or features; Changes apply to new transactions, do not affect successfully paid packages;
  • Price change notice will be posted on the website/application before application.

7. Complaints and transaction disputes

If there is a dispute about a transaction, please:

  1. Contact support@aitranslator.vn within 30 days from the transaction date;
  2. Provide: account email, invoice code, amount, transfer time, statement photo (if necessary);
  3. We respond within 3–5 working days and coordinate reconciliation with SePay/bank when necessary.

Disputes that cannot be resolved by negotiation will be handled according to Vietnamese law. You can also submit a complaint via contact form.

8. Taxes and invoices

Prices displayed on the application may or may not include VAT depending on the regulations at the time of sale. Electronic invoices (if any) will be provided according to valid requests and current legal regulations.

9. Contact

E-mail: support@aitranslator.vn · Contact form · Support page
© 2026 AI Translation System. Privacy · Terms · AI Terms · Payment · Data Deletion · Support

/data-deletion.html:
Data deletion policy

Data Deletion Policy · Updated: June 17, 2026
Privacy Clause AI Terms Pay Delete data Support

1. Purpose

This policy explains how users AI Translation System possible Request deletion of account and personal data, meeting the requirements of Google Play and Apple App Store and data protection regulations.

2. Who can request deletion?

Account owner or legally authorized person (with verification documents if necessary). Requests must be sent from your registered email account or verified via Google Sign-In.

3. How to submit a deletion request

You can choose one in the following ways:

Method 1 — Email (recommended for Google Play / App Store)

Send email to: support@aitranslator.vn

Title: Request to delete AI Translation account

Required content:

  • Email account registration
  • Full name (if any)
  • Reason for deletion (optional)
  • Confirm: “I want to permanently delete my account and all related data”

Method 2 — Contact form on website

Access Contact page, choose a relevant topic and write clearly “Request to delete account” with registration email.

Method 3 — In-app (if feature enabled)

Enter Settings → Accounts → Delete account (when the feature is deployed on the mobile version). If you don't see this section, please use Method 1 or 2.

4. Data will be deleted

After verifying the request, we delete or anonymize:

  • Profile information: name, email, avatar, Google ID
  • Password (hash) and login session token
  • Translation history (text, documents, metadata)
  • User settings (language, theme, …)
  • Login logs (IP, User-Agent)
  • Temporary files on the server (if any)

5. Data can be retained

  • Invoice/payment transaction: Saved according to accounting and tax regulations (usually 5–10 years)
  • Minimum security log: if fraud investigation is required (anonymized where possible)
  • System backup: can last up to 30 days before being completely overwritten

6. Processing time limit

We confirm the request within 7 working days and Complete data deletion within 30 days since successful verification.

You will receive a confirmation email when the process is complete.

7. Cancel Google/Apple login

Delete account on our application not automatically revoke Google Sign-In permission. You can come in Google Account Permissions to remove application access.

8. Consequences after deletion

  • Account or translation history cannot be restored
  • Unused tokens/packages will be destroyed, no refunds will be given (unless required by law)
  • You can register a new account with the same email after deletion

9. Contact

E-mail: support@aitranslator.vn
See more: Privacy policy · Support page
© 2026 AI Translation System. Privacy · Terms · AI Terms · Payment · Data Deletion · Support
Data deletion policy - AI Translation System

/support.html:
Support center

Support · FAQ · User Guide · User Guide · Installation. Installation
Privacy Clause AI Terms Pay Delete data Support

Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

What formats does the application translate?

Supports direct translation of text, PDF and Word documents (.docx) (maximum 50MB/file), and images via OCR. Bilingual mode: regular, adjacent, line break.

How to log in with Google?

Select “Sign in with Google” on the sign-in screen. The app only accepts email, name, and photo public representatives from Google — do not post on your behalf.

What are tokens? How to refill?

Token is used to deduct translation costs (per character/document). New accounts have a free trial plan. Upgrade Pro/Pro Max via Payment (SePay).

Does the translation keep the original format?

The system tries to preserve text color, bolding, italics, underlining, and layout. Some WordArt, Complex textboxes may require manual editing after translation.

How to delete account and data?

See Data deletion policy. Send an email to support@aitranslator.vn with the subject line “Account deletion request”. Data will be deleted within 30 days.

Will my data be shared?

The translated content is sent to an AI provider (Google Translate, DeepL, Gemini) for processing. Details at Privacy policy.

Error when translating file — what to do?

  1. Check network connection and file size (< 50MB)
  2. Try smaller files or standard PDF/Word format
  3. Log out and log back in
  4. Send an email with the file name and error screen image to support@aitranslator.vn

Quick guide

See detailed instructions: Web User Guide · Installation instructions

  1. Text translation: Enter/copy content → select language → Translate
  2. Translate documents: Upload file → select target language → wait for processing → Download
  3. Photo translation: Download or paste an image (Ctrl+V) → OCR → Translate results
  4. History: Review old translations in the History section

Legal links

  • Privacy policy
  • Terms of use
  • Terms of use of AI features
  • Payment policy
  • Data deletion policy

/installation.html:
Installation instructions

Installation Guide · Developer setup

Setting Use the Web FAQ
Vietnamese

1. System requirements

IngredientNote
Python 3.10+Backend Flask
MySQL/MariaDBXAMPP or standalone
Tesseract OCRRequired if using image translation / PDF scan
Word or LibreOfficeOptional — export PDF from DOCX

2. Clone & install dependencies

git clone https://github.com/duyvo26/ai-translation-system.git
cd ai-translation-system/api_base
python -m venv .venv
.venv\Scripts\activate
pip install -r requirements.txt

3. Databases

Create database ai_translation (utf8mb4). Details: files docs/DATABASE_SETUP.md.

cd api_base
python app/models/base_db.py --check
python app/models/base_db.py

4. Configure .env

cd api_base
copy .env.example .env

Adjust important variables:

  • DATABASE_URL — MySQL connection
  • GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET — sign in to Google
  • OPENAI_API_KEY / DEEPL_API_KEY / GEMINI_API_KEY — AI translation
  • TESSERACT_CMD, OCR_LANGS_DEFAULT=eng+vie — OCR
  • SEPAY_API_KEY, PAYMENT_BANK_* — payment (see docs/SEPAY_INTEGRATION.md)

5. Tesseract (Windows)

  1. Download Tesseract OCR and install the English + Vietnamese package
  2. Set TESSERACT_CMD=C:\\Program Files\\Tesseract-OCR\\tesseract.exe

6. Run the server

cd api_base
python run_api.py

Default: http://127.0.0.1:5055 (frontend + API same port).

7. Docker (optional)

docker-compose up --build

8. Troubleshooting

ErrorHow to handle
Port 5055 is usedStop the old process or change BACKEND_PORT
MySQL failedEnable MySQL XAMPP, check DATABASE_URL
OCR errorCheck TESSERACT_CMD and vie language
Google loginMatch GOOGLE_REDIRECT_URI to Google Console

Full documentation: docs/INSTALLATION_GUIDE.md · Web User Guide

/user-guide.html:
Web User Guide

User Guide · Dashboard · Payment · History

Setting Use the Web FAQ
Vietnamese

1. Log in

  1. Open home page → press Log in
  2. Select Google or register email/password
  3. New accounts receive a trial package (free tokens)

2. Dashboard

After logging in, enter Dashboard:

TabFunction
Translate textEnter text, select language, instant translation (≤ 5000 characters)
Translate documentsUpload PDF or Word (.docx) (≤ 50MB)
Translate photosUpload or Ctrl+V → OCR → translate
SettingChoose API: Google / DeepL / Gemini
PayDeposit tokens via QR transfer

3. Translate text

  1. Select source language (or Automatic) and target language
  2. Enter content → Pandemic
  3. Copy or download results; Use the swap button to reverse translation

4. Translate documents

  1. Drag and drop or select PDF/DOCX/… files
  2. Select target language; Embedded image OCR option, bilingual mode
  3. Press Pandemic → wait for process → Download

The system tries to preserve text color, boldface, italics, tables, and layout. Complex PDF is processed through the PDF→DOCX→PDF pipeline.

5. Image translation (OCR)

  1. Image translation tab → upload or paste image (Ctrl+V)
  2. OCR extracts text → select target language → Translate

6. Tokens & payments

  • Tokens deducted each time translation (by character/content)
  • View balance on Dashboard or Profile
  • Upgrade Pro / Pro Max: Payment tab → scan QR → correct transfer CK content
  • The system self-confirms via SePay (a few minutes)

7. History

Menu History — review, redownload, or delete old translations.

8. Support

  • FAQ · Contact
  • E-mail: support@aitranslator.vn
  • Delete account: Data deletion policy

Full documentation: docs/USER_GUIDE.md · Installation instructions

English

1. Sign in

  1. Open the home page → click Sign in
  2. Use Google or email/password registration
  3. New accounts receive a free trial token package

2. Dashboard

After logging in, go to Dashboard:

TabFunction
TextPaste text, pick languages, instant translate (≤ 5000 chars)
DocumentUpload PDF or Word (.docx) (≤ 50MB)
ImageUpload or Ctrl+V → OCR → translate
SettingsChoose API: Google / DeepL / Gemini
PaymentTop up tokens via bank transfer QR

3. Text translation

  1. Select source (or Auto) and target language
  2. Enter content → Translate
  3. Copy or download; use swap button to reverse direction

4. Document translation

  1. Drag & drop or select PDF/DOCX/…
  2. Choose target language; optional embedded OCR, bilingual mode
  3. Click Translate → wait → Download

The system preserves colors, bold, italic, tables and layout. Complex PDFs use PDF→DOCX→PDF pipeline.

5. Image translation (OCR)

  1. Image tab → upload or paste (Ctrl+V)
  2. OCR extracts text → select target language → Translate

6. Tokens & payments

  • Tokens are deducted per translation
  • Check balance on Dashboard or Profile
  • Upgrade Pro / Pro Max: Payment tab → scan QR → transfer with exact description
  • SePay auto-confirms within minutes

7. History

History menu — view, re-download or delete past jobs.

8. Support

  • FAQ · Contact
  • E-mail: support@aitranslator.vn
  • Account deletion: Data deletion policy
